title: Find All Good Strings
hints: Consider digit-by-digit construction, tracking whether the current prefix is already strictly inside the bounds or still tight against s1 or s2.
Use the KMP failure function for evil to track how much of it matches the current suffix, preventing the forbidden substring from forming.
Combine these states in a DP: dp[i][tight_low][tight_high][kmp_state], iterating through each position and valid characters.
